summary_text: 1. **Critical**: CI’s default gate does not execute real slash-command runtime smoke for `/kernel`, `/k`, or `/vote`; it only runs static contract checks unless opt-in env vars are set. [.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L263](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L263) [scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L321](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L321) [scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh#L140](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh#L140) 2. **High**: `/kernel` smoke in the kernel check has no timeout wrapper around `codex exec`, so production verification can hang indefinitely and is not fail-fast. [scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L328](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L328) 3. **High**: Launcher tests are mostly stubbed and do not validate real installed tooling compatibility (actual `codex-prompt-launch`, real `codex`, real `kernel-root`, real shell/session state). [tests/test-kernel-launcher.sh#L30](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-launcher.sh#L30) [tests/test-vote-launchers.sh#L17](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-vote-launchers.sh#L17) [tests/test-codex-orchestrator-snippet.sh#L11](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-codex-orchestrator-snippet.sh#L11) 4. **Medium**: `kernel` launcher’s non-interactive/open flow depends on colocated `k`, but installer-managed binaries do not include `k`; this leaves a real-environment dependency outside installer verification scope. [scripts/local/launchers/kernel#L7](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/kernel#L7) [scripts/local/launchers/kernel#L47](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/kernel#L47) [scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L8](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L8) [scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L560](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L560) 5. **Medium**: Important `k` behavior tests exist (`k` shortcuts, remote path, `k4`) but are not part of the gate’s executed adapter test set, so regressions can pass CI. [tests/test-k-shortcuts.sh#L1](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-k-shortcuts.sh#L1) [tests/test-k-remote.sh#L1](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-k-remote.sh#L1) [tests/test-k4-launcher.sh#L1](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-k4-launcher.sh#L1) [.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L274](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L274)
